name: Idaho Workers' Comp for Long-Term Chemical Exposure in Boise

mainEntity.name: Can I get workers' comp for long-term chemical exposure in Boise, Idaho?
mainEntity.text: Can I get workers' comp for long-term chemical exposure in Boise, Idaho?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Idaho workers' comp covers occupational diseases from long-term chemical exposure if proven work-related, with benefits including medical care and wage replacement up to 104 weeks.

suggestedAnswer.text: Idaho Code § 72-442 defines occupational diseases as those arising from work exposure. For cumulative effects like solvent neuropathy, file within 1 year of diagnosis. Boise claims need detailed exposure history. Employers may argue non-work causes; secure independent medical exams. Local firms like Just Work Comp Law can navigate Idaho Industrial Commission filings to maximize benefits.
